document.title: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet]
document.documentType: Approval Sheet with Harness Specification and Packaging Specification

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet G25000302 Rev. 0 for harness MSH-000106 / USL20-40SS-006-C+T1P(BLUE_HARNESS_SIGNAL).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as supplier/customer approval documentation with harness, electrical, packaging, and revision-history details for the listed product.
keyPoints: Product name is MSH-000106, model number is 02-H-0024-b, and item number is USL20-40SS-006-C+T1P(BLUE_HARNESS_SIGNAL).
Harness specification applies to Harness MSH-000106 and lists mechanical structure, component composition, and electrical specifications.
Packaging specification applies to packaging of Harness MSH-000106 and describes packaging materials and packing steps.
Revision history lists 2025.05.23 as Initial Approval for model USL20-40SS-006-C+T1P(BLUE_HARNESS_SIGNAL).

entities.name: (주)레프코리아
entities.evidence: 공급 업체명 (주)레프코리아 대표이사 조 선 웅

evidence.claim: The approval sheet number is G25000302.
The document revision is Rev. 0.
The approval sheet identifies product name MSH-000106.
The approval sheet identifies model number 02-H-0024-b.
The approval sheet identifies item number USL20-40SS-006-C+T1P(BLUE_HARNESS_SIGNAL).
The harness specification applies to Harness MSH-000106.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 사양은 Harness 『MSH-000106』 제품에 적용 됩니다.

evidence.claim: The product name in the harness specification is USL20-40SS-006-C+T1P(BLUE_HARNESS_SIGNAL).
The mechanical structure for drawing 02-H-0024-b is 40Pin, L=60mm, 1:N.
The rated current is 0.25A per pin/line.
The contact resistance is 100 mΩ or less excluding cable resistance.
The dielectric withstand voltage is AC 200V for 1 minute.
The insulation resistance is 100 MΩ at 250V DC.
The conductor resistance is maximum 7,500 Ω/km for internal conductor at 20°C.
The nominal impedance is 45 Ω.
The component list includes connector USL20-40S manufactured by KEL.
The component list includes YHMCC cable by YEONHAB, AWG 42, 60mm.
The component list includes Binding Tape by NITTO DENKO, 5mm.
The packaging specification applies to packaging of Harness MSH-000106.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 사양은 Harness 『 MSH-000106 』 제품 포장에 적용 됩니다.

evidence.claim: Each product is packaged as an individual bundle of 10 ea.
evidence.evidenceText: 각 제품은 그림과 같이 개별 1묶음(10ea)으로 포장을 한다.

evidence.claim: Packaging materials include PE (0.03x35x130), cushioning material (280x620), packaging box W340xD260xH150, and packaging tape.
evidence.evidenceText: PE (0.03x35x130) 10 reams 개별 포장지; 완충재(280x620); 포장 상자(W340xD260xH150); 포장용 테이프

evidence.claim: Revision history records Initial Approval on 2025.05.23.
evidence.evidenceText: 2025.05.23 Initial Approval S.B. Park J.H. Sun
